title: Add notes to columns

posts.author: Jorgeagh (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday guys
I recommend to add notes at columns (head of the column)to put there instructions columns responsable persons , instructions , process, notes
because here is a lot of questions for new people using Monday ,that would facilitate the operation

Thanks
Jorge

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Jorgeagh

Welcome to the community!. There is such a thing as “column description”. It can be edited by clicking the 3 dots in the column header and select Settings > Add description. If it is set (i.e. not empty) a little info icon is shown in the column header. Hope that helps.

posts.author: Jorgeagh (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks man you help me a lot!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
